info.title: VidInfra Live API
info.description:
Livestreaming API server with hybrid architecture combining LiveKit (WebRTC) for interactive features and MediaMTX for RTMP/HLS streaming.

## Authentication
Most endpoints require a Bearer token in the `Authorization` header.
- **Host users**: Login with email/password via `/auth/login`
- **Viewers**: Register with device token via `/auth/viewer/register`, then login via `/auth/viewer/device-login`
- **Auth code flow**: Generate short-lived codes for cross-device auth

## Response Format
All responses follow a standard envelope:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { ... },
  "timestamp": 1700000000
}
```
Error responses:
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": "Error message",
  "timestamp": 1700000000
}
```

post.summary: Create a new session in a room

post.description: Host only. Starts the streaming session.

get.summary: Get monitor token for a session

recipient_id.description: Optional target user UUID for direct message

value.message: Could not determine authentication type from request. Please provide a valid Authorization header or X-API-Key header.
